feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: What are the limitations to the number of columns a vertex/edge table can have for sap hana graph ?
entry.content:
Is there any limitation as to what number of columns can be added in a table in sap hana db . I intend to use the table to create a graph workspace. Since sap hana mainly uses homogenous graphs with single label , hence I plan to add all my columns in a single table. 

Hence is there any upper limit as to what number of columns will sap hana support ?

Kindly advice.

entry.title: Remote source definition
entry.content:
We are trying to refresh a lab database from another system but would like to keep the definitions of the remote source in tact.  Is there a process to store off the definitions and then import after a system has been refreshed from a backup of another system?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Cross xsa application (node modules) access
entry.content:
I am trying to build cross application access, or there are two projects deployed on the same XSA space. 

The app A has db, node and ui modules and in the node, it has web service which reads or updates some data from the db module. 

There is another app B which has only node and ui modules. (no db modules and I don't want to create db module just to be able to solve my problem with creating cross container access, because I would have to create whole HDI container just for reading one record from remote table).

Using the Enable Applications to Perform Tasks with the Authority of Other Applications I tried to build the cross app access, but still no success.

Any ideas or suggestions are very welcome.

Best Regards,

Simona

entry.title: SAP HANA Graphical View , calculated column, multiple match values
entry.content:
Hi experts,

How to write the multiple match values of calculated columns in SAP HANA Graphical View ?

For example,  like 1001* and like 1002* and like 1003*......

The input 1001*,1002*,1003* not work.

Tks.

entry.title: Performance Optimization in field symbols
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

There was an existing code as below where observed that it consumes some time in the trace and <lt_data> holds around 40 records.

Is there an option that i can fine tune this to increase the performance. Thanks.

        LOOP AT <lt_data> ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_data>).
          ASSIGN COMPONENT 'fpm_bol_guibb_ref_0000000009' OF STRUCTURE <fs_data> TO FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_value>).
          IF <fs_value> IS ASSIGNED.
            <fs_value> = abap_true.
          ENDIF.
        ENDLOOP.

 

REgards,

Karthik S

entry.title: JS engine in XS hana classic
entry.content:
Does anyone knows what version of SpiderMonkey/ecma script hana XS classic uses? Is it different in different SPs of hana or the same in each system?
My intent was to transpile typescript into something that hana would understand, but not sure which compilation target should I choose

entry.title: How to reset system user password in HANA database?
entry.content:
Hi All,

how to reset system user password in HANA database. STOP DB and execute nameserver.ini and enter new password. 

Regards,

entry.title: Where can I find the results of the CALL CHECK_TABLE_CONSISTENCY query in SAP HANA Database
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

After executing this query for consistency check:

CALL CHECK_TABLE_CONSISTENCY ('CHECK', 'NULL', 'NULL');

Where can I find the result of the query? from where I can analyze it? does it create trace file?

In what format the output will generate for this?

Please let me know where can I find the result for this.

Thank you in Advance!

 

Best Regards,

Shruti

entry.title: Is there a benchmark performance for openCypher query vs sql join query for data in SAP HANA Graph?
entry.content:
Hi All , 

Basically  we are evaluating what kind of performance gain we can expect on using open cypher query instead of simple sql joins .

We are mainly focusing on retrieval time for filtering in 1Million-10Million rows and around 500-1000 columns. 

Also is there a performance impact on using homogenous graph and heterogenous graph . If yes are there any readings for the same ?

Help is highly appreciated.

entry.title: Automatically creating a suboperation or another operation when an operation is added in SAP PM
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m working with SAP PM Work Orders and I need to configure a scenario where adding a specific operation in a work order (IW31/IW32) will automatically create a suboperation or another operation.

My question is:

• Is there a standard SAP way to achieve this without ABAP development?

I appreciate any insights or guidance from those who have dealt with similar requirements.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: ADRC number for a plant is same in both the clients
entry.content:
We have situation where a plant is created in 100 client and which generated a ADRC number 4000 for in the client, and when moved TR is moved to 200 and if the same 4000 is already assinged to an existing plant in 200 client for same Dev , system is picking the 200 client address for 100 client plant since the ADRC 4000 is assigned the same, 

example- 

Plant ABCD with ADRC number 4000 country code as HU( Hungary ) , when this TR is moved to 200 and ADRC table if ADRNR = 4000 with Country code CA (Canada) then HU plant now have CA as it country code, this doesn't happen for all but only with same ADRNR number

entry.title: Data is not equally distributed in all the partitions
entry.content:
The table data is not equally distributed in all the partitions in BW scale out system. We tried to perform Optimize table partitioning, but the table SAP***./BIC/F*** is not being selected in generated plan.  We did optimize table distribution but this doesn't helped. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Get PDF Action in Sales Contract API | S4 Output | PDF to external system
entry.content:
Is it possible to enhance the Sales Contract API(SAP Business Accelerator Hub) to include a Get PDF action similar to what is avaialable in the Billing Document API?

Get PDF of Billing Document | SAP Help Portal

We are trying to send the form output generated from the Sales contract to an external system. We are able to easily do it for billing documents since the API has the standard operation for PDF but the same is not available for Sales Contracts.For output management,we are using S4 output.

entry.title: Determine number of times each HANA view has been executed, and by whom?
entry.content: I need to know the number of times each view in my HANA system has been executed over the last few months. I also need to know which users have executed those views. Is that possible? Does auditing need to be set up to obtain those metrics? If so, can someone direct me to practical examples? Best Practices and Recommendations for Creating Audit Policies is interesting but none of the examples seems to apply to what I'm trying to accomplish.

entry.title: What are the cases where homogenous graph and heterogenous graph should be used ?
entry.content:
Hi , In what cases do we use homogenous graphs and heterogenous graphs in SAP HANA DB.

Is there a performance difference in using homogenous and heterogenous graphs .

Any sample use cases for homogenous and heterogenous graphs would be very helpful.

Thank you

entry.title: S4 Hana Standard Change and Prerequisites
entry.content:
Hi, 

 

Does someone here know where can I get the list of standard change for S4 Hana (Standard for us is only small configuration that does not take more than 3 hours of work and has no to small impact in the system) and their prerequisites (complete info needed to make the standard change)?

Example is below:

1. Create a Storage 

Prerequisites: storage location code, description, plant

2. Create New Tax code

Prerequisites: Tax code, tax type, Tax rate, Country, Current code for reference

Thank you!

entry.title: Questions about CHECK_TABLE_CONSISTENCY
entry.content:
Here are the questions about CHECK_TABLE_CONSISTENCY.

Q1: How can I check if the table consistency check (CHECK_TABLE_CONSISTENCY) has been executed?

Q2: If it has not been executed yet, how can I execute it manually?

Q3: What is the impact on the HANA system if I do not execute CHECK_TABLE_CONSISTENCY?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: COP1 Transaction - error message VHUPD002 For the material no packing instructions could be found.
entry.content:
In S/4Hana the transaction COWBPACK will be replaced by COP1 or COP2.

In our project for Planned Handling Units out of production are following steps:

POP1: Create packing instructions

POF1: Determination of the packing instruction

COR01: Creation of a production order

CORK: Confirmation of the order 

COP1: Create Planned Handling Units – not working error message please see screenshot below

The error message has the number: VHUPD002

For the material no packing instructions could be found.

But if you see the process which I made material and packing instruction are linked and matched correctly.

How I can solve this problem in the system? What is missing?

Is there any specific customizing setting for this transaction COP1 in S/4HANA?

Thanks for your support.

entry.title: Intrastat not showing automatic CN
entry.content:
#HANA #Intrastat
We are issuing billings to our EU customers. At the same minute/ hour we issue also automatic credit note which is CN correction for price (rebate) - there is no returns only price correction. The problem is that those CN are not available in Intrastat dispatches nor in Intrastat Receipts. for this we use "value cr. rd. AutoCN" request.
I've read available documentation and I know what for CN/ DN if they are related to goods they will be available in Intrastat receipts. But my case is different and I am not sure how to see CN in Intrastat

entry.title: HCM Payroll PCR Attendance Bonus
entry.content:
The client wants to pay an attendance bonus based on the following conditions:

If an employee is present for the entire month – ₹1500.
If an employee takes one day of leave (paid/unpaid) – ₹1000.
If an employee takes two days of leave (paid/unpaid) – ₹500.
If an employee joins on the first day of the month – ₹1500.
If an employee joins on the first day of the month and takes one day of leave (paid/unpaid) – ₹1000.
If an employee joins on the second day of the month and takes one day of leave (paid/unpaid) – ₹500.
If an employee joins on the first day of the month and takes more than one day of leave – ₹0.
I have tried handling this through a PCR, but it is not considering employees who joined on the second day of the month.

How can I resolve this issue? Please suggest a solution
